chatWithMessages.assistantMessage:
Esmu Kai — personīgais asistents, kas paliek līdzās un patiešām iepazīst tevi.

```kai-ui
{"type": "column", "children": [{"type": "card", "children": [{"type": "text", "value": "Es atceros", "style": "title", "bold": true}, {"type": "text", "value": "Tavas preferences, projektus, kā tev patīk lietas darīt. Nākamajā mēnesī es joprojām to zinu.", "style": "body"}]}, {"type": "card", "children": [{"type": "text", "value": "Es izdaru lietas", "style": "title", "bold": true}, {"type": "text", "value": "Atgādinājumi, e-pasts, kalendārs, čaulas komandas — pieslēgts tavai ierīcei un tavai dzīvei.", "style": "body"}]}, {"type": "card", "children": [{"type": "text", "value": "Es mācos", "style": "title", "bold": true}, {"type": "text", "value": "Ne tikai faktus, bet modeļus.
```
